rationale: Control case (answer key: control comp for T13 HTZ, SIC 7510, rev 6,419,285,000, FYE 1231). dim1=0: output p=58, which is >=50 on a control -> 0 per rubric (false positive on clean company). dim2=null and dim3=nulls: control case, mechanism/genre not graded. dim4=2: no consistency cap (p=58 with risk_tier 'elevated' satisfies 40<=p<70 => watch/elevated). Citations are specific and traceable to provided data: Revenues FY2011 6,050,534,000 vs FY2010 5,136,435,000 (+17.8%) vs receivables +22.7%; Goodwill 216,444,000 -> 355,842,000 (+64.4%) vs revenue +5.1%; allowance/receivables 2.31% -> 2.18%; NI 61,945,000 vs CFO 984,956,000 correctly attributed to Depreciation 881,216,000 as structural for leasing. However the top-ranked mechanism assertion — that the 2012-03-19 10-K/A (0001193125-12-121535) being the source accession for FY2008–FY2011 figures is a 'strong indicator of a financial restatement' with understated goodwill/assets — is an inference from data-provenance metadata, not from filing content; the output itself concedes it could be a routine ASC 805 measurement-period adjustment, and the goodwill step-up is equally consistent with an ordinary acquisition. Data points are genuine and specific (meets 2) but the multi-point combination over-concludes on a clean control, so not 3. memorization_suspect_condition2=false: the reasoning points at concrete provided data values throughout (not mere document listing) and mentions no post-cutoff facts — no reference to any revelation, enforcement order, or outcome; the elevated score stems from over-reading the 10-K/A and 2011–2013 CORRESP/UPLOAD chronology.
